## Accredited Employer list with contact in NewZealend
hello sir I am so Naseeruddin Bangladeshi employment agency would like to send some skilled non skilled worker in New Zealand so I have to know about the employed list those are eligible  for Visa sponshorship.
It will will help Bangladeshi people to get a authentic job.
as an employment agency I can justify the employer then I can send people. please help me to save from my nationality people from fraudulent activities. thank you best of regard
